prompt:
What's the accessibility issue with this?

```swift
Image(systemName: "plus")
    .onTapGesture { addItem() }
```

assertions.text: Identifies onTapGesture as invisible to VoiceOver and assistive technology
assertions.rationale: Skill's #1 AI failure: onTapGesture instead of Button

assertions.text: Replaces with Button and adds accessibilityLabel
assertions.rationale: Skill's critical rule: always use Button for interactive elements

assertions.text: Mentions Switch Control and/or eye tracking as also affected
assertions.rationale: Skill documents that ALL assistive tech is affected, not just VoiceOver
